panel_used: Single-panel grid of 10 boxplots (log10 normalized counts) for the top 10 differentially abundant taxa between non-smokers and smokers; direction read from relative median position of each species' two boxes.
color_map: Red/salmon = non-smoker (group_0), teal/cyan = smoker (group_1), per the in-figure legend at the bottom of the panel (this matches the axis tick labels 'non-smoker'/'smoker' under each box, though the legend text in the caption describes blue/red which does not match the actual rendered colors).
notes: All 10 panels are clearly legible boxplots with visible median lines for both groups; direction determined by comparing median (center line of box) of smoker (teal) vs non-smoker (red) boxes on the log10 y-axis. Taxa labels include numeric prefixes (likely internal feature/OTU IDs) which were kept as shown in the panel titles.
